resources.name: [concat(parameters('factoryName'), '/How to copy the data from input blob to output as soon as the status turns to y')]

sqlReaderQuery.value:
DECLARE @getmetadataoutput varchar(max)
set @getmetadataoutput = '@{activity('Get Metadata1').output.childItems}'

select * from openjson(@getmetadataoutput) with (FolderName varchar(50) '$.name')

where isdate(FolderName) = 1

insert into file_count
select '@{variables('empty')}','@{variables('nonempty')}'

select 1 as output
